cd312c4b03dc.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
cd312c4b03dc.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
cd312c4b03dc.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

e278b68f42ad.title: Close the hygiene gap — 4 to 5
e278b68f42ad.description: An FSA rating of 4 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
e278b68f42ad.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

1798d8b14a7f.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
1798d8b14a7f.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

21943dbce637.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
21943dbce637.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
21943dbce637.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

925b7eb11965.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
925b7eb11965.description: At 144 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
